name: GREENLIGHT CAPITAL RE, LTD.
summary: Greenlight Capital Re, Ltd. is a global specialty property and casualty reinsurer established in 2004 and headquartered in the Cayman Islands, listed on NASDAQ (GLRE). It operates through Greenlight Re (Grand Cayman), GRIL (Dublin, Ireland), and Syndicate 3456 at Lloyd's. The company offers multi-line P&C reinsurance globally, specialty reinsurance, and an Innovations business unit supporting technology-driven insurance partners with seed capital and reinsurance capacity, complemented by a non-traditional investment strategy through Solasglas Investments, LP.

products.name: Multi-line Property and Casualty Reinsurance
products.description: Global P&C reinsurance written on non-proportional and proportional bases across multiple classes and geographies.

products.name: Specialty Reinsurance (GRIL)
products.description: Specialty reinsurance business focused mainly on the London and European markets through GRIL in Dublin, Ireland.

products.name: Lloyd's Syndicate 3456
products.description: Lloyd's underwriting platform providing general insurance and reinsurance capacity through Greenlight Innovation Syndicate 3456.

products.name: Innovations Business Unit
products.description: Seed capital and reinsurance capacity provided to innovative, technology-driven insurance partners since 2018.

products.name: Solasglas Investment Strategy
products.description: Non-traditional investment approach managed by DME Advisors, LP, targeting higher long-term returns than traditional reinsurer strategies.

partnerships.description: Investment advisor managing Solasglas Investments, LP, the primary investment vehicle for Greenlight Capital Re's assets.
Affiliated investment firm led by David Einhorn, Chairman of the Board, connected to the company's investment strategy.
